ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density per square mile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic category */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race or ethnicity description */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Estimated percentage of the demographic in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic group */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Total doses administered */,
  "people_vaccinated_one_dose" INTEGER /* Total people vaccinated with at least one dose */,
  "people_fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total people fully vaccinated */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination data was last updated */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate as a percentage of the demographic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination site */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the site is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the vaccination site */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for inquiries regarding the site */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the vaccination site */,
  "staff_count" INTEGER /* Number of staff members at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_sites_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "goal" INTEGER /* Goal for the number of vaccinations */,
  "budget" REAL /* Allocated budget for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination campaign */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination site */,
  "number_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinations administered at the site during the campaign */,
  "participant_role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., nurse, volunteer, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_participants_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES vaccination_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_participants_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES vaccination_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "total_doses" INTEGER /* Total doses administered overall */,
  "total_one_dose" INTEGER /* Total people vaccinated with at least one dose overall */,
  "total_full_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total people fully vaccinated overall */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate as a percentage of the county population */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_statistics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., public health, IT, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of day when the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination campaign */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES vaccination_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_lot" (
  "lot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine lot */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the vaccine */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of vaccine doses in the lot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_administration" (
  "administration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine administration */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination record */,
  "lot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccine lot */,
  "administration_date" TEXT /* Date of vaccine administration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_administration_lot_id FOREIGN KEY ("lot_id") REFERENCES vaccination_lot ("lot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_administration_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("record_id")
)
